/CAL: DISTRICT ATTORNEY'S OR PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE OR MODIFY PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X: PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING/3000ADM/X: ADMITS VIOLATION #1/3000REIN/PAJ: 135 DAYS/CTORD:THERE IS NO TIME LOST ONPAROLE DUE TO THE ADMISSION OF THIS     VIOLATION/SAORD/SA1: DANIELLE L,/SA2: 1035 MARKET STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD3/X: PAROLEE SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT FOR 19 DAYS,/4019HALF/X: REMAINDER OF VIOLATIONS ARE DISMISSED/  /X: TREATMENT PLAN TO BE ORDERED THROUGH PAROLE/X: PAROLEE ORDERED TO REPORT TOPAROLE UPON RELEASE AND FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS GIVEN BY THE PAROLE AGENT,/

/CAL:PAROLE'S PETITION TO REVOKE PAROLE PURSUANT TO PC3000,08/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING,/PDP/WIAPTR/X: PAROLEE ENTERS A NOT TRUE AS TO THE ALLEGATIONS,/CTORD:PAROLE ADMINISTRATIVELY REVOKED/NB/CONTD:PAROLE PREHEARING CONFERENCE/
/X:PAROLE AGENT JUSTIN LUGAR APPEARING VIA ZOOM,/DEF:4011,5 TODAY/CAL:PTRFILING (PAROLE) /CONT/
